content.json:
## AVD Rebuild Tracker
Live pipeline state for `Recreate-AVDSessionHosts`. Each session host moves through a sequence of phases; this workbook shows where every VM is right now, how long each phase took, and what (if anything) failed.

_Source: `AzureDiagnostics` (Automation `JobStreams` / `JobLogs`) in this Log Analytics workspace._

parameters.name: Hostpool
parameters.label: Hostpool
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts"
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Hostpool = extract(@"^([A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9]*?)-\d+$", 1, VmName)
| where isnotempty(Hostpool)
| summarize by Hostpool
| order by Hostpool asc

content.json:
### Live per-VM state
Latest status for every session host the runbook has touched in the selected window.

content.query:
let base = AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts";
let phaseRows = base
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Phase  = extract(@"status=(\w+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Detail = trim(@"\s+", extract(@"status=\w+\s*(.*)$", 1, ResultDescription))
| where isnotempty(VmName) and isnotempty(Phase)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase, Detail;
let successRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDCOMPLETED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Completed", Detail = "Rebuild completed (terminal marker)";
let failureRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDFAILED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Detail = trim(@"\s+", extract(@"Reason=(.*)$", 1, ResultDescription))
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Failed", Detail;
union phaseRows, successRows, failureRows
| where VmName matches regex strcat(@"^", "{Hostpool}", @"-\d")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, Phase, Detail) by VmName
| extend ['Time in phase'] = iff(Phase in ('Completed', 'Failed'), timespan(null), now() - TimeGenerated)
| project VmName, Phase, ['Last update']=TimeGenerated, ['Time in phase'], Detail
| order by VmName asc
content.noDataMessage: No runbook activity in this time range.

content.json:
### Rebuild duration
Total time per VM for the **latest rebuild cycle** (events from the most recent `Capturing` onward). Excludes `Pending`, `Completed`, and `Failed` — so the value is the actual hands-on rebuild work (claim → register), not queue wait or post-finish idle.

content.query:
let base = AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts";
let phaseRows = base
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Phase = extract(@"status=(\w+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName) and isnotempty(Phase)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase;
let successRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDCOMPLETED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Completed";
let failureRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDFAILED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Failed";
let allEvents = union phaseRows, successRows, failureRows
| where VmName matches regex strcat(@"^", "{Hostpool}", @"-\d");
let lastCapture = allEvents | where Phase == "Capturing" | summarize CycleStart = max(TimeGenerated) by VmName;
allEvents
| join kind=inner lastCapture on VmName
| where TimeGenerated >= CycleStart
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase
| order by VmName asc, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend NextTime = next(TimeGenerated), NextVm = next(VmName)
| extend EndTime = iff(NextVm == VmName and isnotnull(NextTime), NextTime, now())
| extend DurationSec = todouble(datetime_diff('second', EndTime, TimeGenerated))
| where DurationSec > 0
| where Phase !in ("Pending", "Completed", "Failed")
| summarize TotalSec = sum(DurationSec) by VmName
| extend ['Total time'] = strcat(toint(TotalSec/60), 'm ', toint(TotalSec) % 60, 's')
| project VmName, ['Total time']
| order by VmName asc
content.noDataMessage: No rebuild activity in this time range.
